headline: Is Copart, Inc. (CPRT) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CPRT a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Copart, Inc. on The Fat Pitch’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CPRT. Copart, Inc.’s share was trading at $33.74 as of April 21st. CPRT’s trailing and forward P/E were 21.23 and 20.04 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]
